title: orthocarpus barbatus
intro: Orthocarpus barbatus, also known as the yellow monkey flower, is a flowering plant species in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Orthocarpus barbatus include its ability to relieve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
